notes: Consolidated Google access, data deletion and revoke controls into one Settings section.
Improved Pathmark Online theme contrast and added a true dark theme with consistent button text.
Refined guided setup wording and button layout while keeping examples as user-facing prompts.
Updated Area colour controls so the selected Google Calendar colour preview updates immediately.
Made routine preferred-day controls clearer by hiding them for Daily routines.
Tidied Review Queue and Tasklist screens to reduce alarming tables and button clutter.
Removed redundant example-guidance and disembodied hint sections from the Online workspace.
